title: Access Governance — SoD Violation Auto-Remediation & Certification Campaigns
description: access_governance_engine.py implements IGA with entitlements, SoD ALL-match detection, role management, and certification campaigns. access_governance_router.py exposes the full API. Gap: SoD violations are detected but not auto-remediated — a human must manually revoke the conflicting entitlement. Certification campaigns are created but not delivered to reviewers.
missing: SoD auto-remediation: when a critical SoD violation is detected, auto-revoke the lower-privilege entitlement and notify the access owner
Certification campaign delivery: email each reviewer their certification queue link when a campaign is created, with a deadline reminder at T-7 days
Entitlement expiry enforcement: background job that revokes entitlements past their expires_at timestamp and notifies the access owner
